headlines.headline: Senators hold Rangers to fewest shots by NHL team since 2003
headlines.description: The Senators allowed just nine shots on goal in a 2-1 victory at Madison Square Garden. It was the fewest shots against in franchise history, the Rangers' lowest output since 1955 -- and the worst by any NHL team in more than two decades.
